content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Seen: Link Building & Outreach Manager (SaaS Listicles + Brand Mentions) Anywhere in the World All Other Remote Contract <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain Barcelona </p> <p>Seen is an AI SEO and GEO agency helping SaaS companies grow visibility on Google and AI search platforms.</p> <p>We work with ambitious SaaS brands that care about pipeline and revenue, not vanity metrics. Our clients include Aura, Artisan, Hunter, Riverside, Sphere, Nextiva, just to name a few.</p> <p>Our mission is simple: help SaaS companies get found, build authority, and turn search visibility into revenue.</p> <p>We’re a lean, fast-moving remote team focused on real results.</p> <p><strong>The role</strong></p> <p>We’re hiring an Outreach Manager to own and scale our link building + brand mentions engine.</p> <p>This is not a basic VA outreach role.</p> <p>We’re looking for someone proactive, commercial, organized, and sharp — someone who understands that every quality placement, relationship, backlink, and mention can directly impact rankings, traffic, pipeline, and AI visibility.</p> <p>You’ll work closely with our founder Irina and SEO/GEO Manager Cindy to help grow authority for our clients.</p> <h2>Tasks</h2> <ul> <li>Run cold outreach campaigns to secure backlinks, guest posts, brand mentions, listicle placements, and strategic partnerships</li> <li>Build and manage long-term relationships with editors, publishers, and website owners in the SaaS space</li> <li>Execute link building campaigns for clients based on monthly priorities and KPIs</li> <li>Manage the full guest post process from prospecting to publication</li> <li>Keep outreach pipelines, trackers, and reporting organized and up to date</li> <li>Improve and automate workflows to increase efficiency and results</li> <li>Take ownership of the process and consistently push campaigns forward</li> </ul> <h2>Requirements</h2> <ul> <li>Experience in cold outreach, link building, or partnerships</li> <li>SaaS or B2B experience preferred</li> <li>Strong written English and communication skills</li> <li>Organized, proactive, and reliable with follow-ups</li> <li>Able to work independently and own results</li> <li>3+ hours overlap with European time zones</li> </ul> <h2>Benefits</h2> <ul> <li>Fully remote role</li> <li>Flexible schedule, results matter more than hours</li> <li>Unlimited time off</li> <li>Small but very productive team where your work truly matters</li> <li>Learn advanced SEO, GEO, AI search, growth systems, and automations</li> <li>Opportunity to grow into a bigger role</li> </ul> <p>This role can become much more than outreach if you’re ambitious.</p> <p><strong>Hiring process</strong></p> <ol> <li>Short application + answers to a few questions</li> <li>Intro chat</li> <li>Test task + feedback</li> <li>Final interview</li> </ol> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/seen-link-building-outreach-manager-saas-listicles-brand-mentions">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/seen-link-building-outreach-manager-saas-listicles-brand-mentions</a></p> https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/seen-link-building-outreach-manager-saas-listicles-brand-mentions Contra: Brand Designer Anywhere in the World California Design Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0083/5744/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> San Francisco, CA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://bit.ly/3kLhMdk">http://bit.ly/3kLhMdk</a> </p> <div class="bn-block-outer"> <div class="bn-block"> <div class="bn-block-content"> <div class="bn-inline-content"> <p><strong>About&nbsp;Contra&nbsp;Labs</strong></p> <p>Contra Labs sits at the intersection of human creativity and AI. We partner with leading AI labs and product companies to improve their tools across design, video, development, and beyond. Our research is grounded in how top creatives actually work, studying the patterns behind what gets created, what gets chosen, and what resonates. We believe human input will always be at the center of net new creation, and our mission is to help shape technology so human creativity can be amplified to create what today is unimaginable.</p> <p>By&nbsp;joining&nbsp;the&nbsp;Contra&nbsp;Labs&nbsp;network&nbsp;you&nbsp;gain&nbsp;access&nbsp;to&nbsp;paid&nbsp;projects&nbsp;with&nbsp;some&nbsp;of&nbsp;the&nbsp;most&nbsp;innovative&nbsp;companies&nbsp;building&nbsp;the&nbsp;next&nbsp;generation&nbsp;of&nbsp;creative&nbsp;and&nbsp;AI-powered&nbsp;tools.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>How&nbsp;It&nbsp;Works</strong></p> <p>This is an application to join the network and be eligible for roles as they arise. Projects are staffed on an as needed basis, typically 5 to 10 hours at a time, though some may extend into longer engagements. In unique cases, we may have full-time roles available as well. When a project matches your skill set, we'll reach out with details and timeline.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To&nbsp;Join&nbsp;the&nbsp;Network</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Portfolio&nbsp;review</strong> - We'll assess your Contra profile and portfolio for strength in brand design, including visual identity systems, logo design, and brand guidelines.</li> <li><strong>Video&nbsp;interview</strong> - You'll record a brief video sharing more about your experience and your approach to brand design.</li> <li><strong>Skills&nbsp;assessment</strong> - If accepted, you'll complete a short assessment aligned to the types of tasks you'd work on (e.g., evaluating AI-generated brand assets, providing structured feedback on visual identity outputs).</li> </ul> <p><strong>What&nbsp;You&nbsp;May&nbsp;Work&nbsp;On</strong></p> <ul> <li>Evaluate AI generated brand design outputs including logos, color systems, typography pairings, and brand identity assets</li> <li>Provide clear, structured feedback on whether outputs meet professional brand design tandards across consistency, versatility, and visual impact</li> <li>Help&nbsp;define&nbsp;creative&nbsp;benchmarks&nbsp;and&nbsp;taste&nbsp;standards&nbsp;for&nbsp;what&nbsp;great&nbsp;brand&nbsp;design&nbsp;looks&nbsp;like&nbsp;in&nbsp;the&nbsp;next&nbsp;generation&nbsp;of&nbsp;AI-powered&nbsp;tools</li> <li>Contribute to research on how convergence (shared best practices) and divergence (individual taste and creative direction) shape brand design qu
